label: PA1_NEURAL_PROGENITOR
resolved_names: dp1 (roof-plate-adjacent MSX1+/MSX2+/ZIC1+ class A dorsal progenitor)
tissue_context: spinal cord (alar plate, dorsal neural tube)
evidence: HDCA Supplementary Table 9 assigns PA1_NEURAL_PROGENITOR to broad_celltype CNS_SPINAL_PROGENITOR, systems NERVOUS_SYSTEM, CL term CL:4042021. Top gene signature (SOX2,ZIC1,DCX,MSX2,MSX1,DCC,BSCL2,ELAVL3,POU3F2,MAP6,ADGRG1,STMN4,SSTR2,DPYSL4,RCOR2,DLL1,LRRN1,ZIC2,RND2,DRAXIN) matches canonical dp1 (roof-plate-adjacent MSX1+/MSX2+/ZIC1+ class A dorsal progenitor) markers documented in Lu 2015, Castellani 2013, Gray de Cristoforis 2020.
